text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. My next race is in Kyoto,<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Just thought I'd better do<n>some
pre-race research.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I found all sorts of hidden fishing spots!<n>Whenever
the fishing itch hits, just leave<n>it to me. ♪
